findings.title: No CSRF Protection on State-Changing API Endpoints
findings.description: All state-changing API endpoints lack CSRF protection. The session cookie uses SameSite=Lax which provides partial protection, but POST requests from same-site context are not protected.
findings.evidence: POST endpoints only check session cookie validity without CSRF token validation
findings.recommendation: Implement CSRF tokens for all state-changing endpoints.

findings.title: Missing Secure Cookie Flag in Docker Deployment
findings.description: The session cookie is set without the Secure flag, exposing session tokens to network eavesdropping over HTTP.
findings.evidence: response.set_cookie sets httponly=True and samesite=Lax but no secure=True
findings.recommendation: Add secure=True when HTTPS is detected or add configuration option.

findings.title: No Password Policy Enforcement
findings.description: generate_password_hash accepts any password without validation, allowing weak passwords.
findings.evidence: generate_password_hash has no password strength validation
findings.recommendation: Add password strength validation before hashing.

findings.title: Sensitive Header Redaction Regex May Miss Edge Cases
findings.description: The redaction regex only handles authorization and x-api-key headers, missing other sensitive headers.
findings.owasp: A09:2021 - Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
findings.evidence: SENSITIVE_HEADERS set is limited to two headers
findings.recommendation: Expand SENSITIVE_HEADERS to include common API key headers.

findings.title: Config File Writable in Docker Container
findings.description: config.yaml is mounted as writable, introducing risk if application is compromised.
findings.recommendation: Add config change audit logging and file permission checks.

findings.title: No Rate Limiting on Authenticated API Endpoints
findings.description: Authenticated API endpoints lack rate limiting, allowing abuse with compromised session.
findings.recommendation: Implement rate limiting on authenticated endpoints.

findings.title: Client IP May Be Incorrectly Identified Behind Proxy
findings.description: Lockout uses request.remote which may be proxy IP in Docker deployments.
findings.recommendation: Add trusted proxy configuration and use X-Forwarded-For header.

findings.title: Session Not Invalidated on Logout
findings.description: No logout endpoint implemented. Sessions only invalidated on 24-hour expiry.
findings.recommendation: Implement logout endpoint to terminate sessions.

findings.title: No Content Security Policy on Admin Dashboard
findings.description: Dashboard HTML lacks CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, and X-Frame-Options headers.
findings.evidence: handle_dashboard returns web.Response with no security headers
findings.recommendation: Add security headers: CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options.

findings.title: Admin Password Hash Stored in Config File
findings.description: admin_password_hash stored in main config file, risking accidental exposure.
findings.evidence: config.admin_password_hash loaded from main config file
findings.recommendation: Consider storing password hash in separate file with restricted permissions.

residual_risks.description: No HTTPS enforcement in Docker deployment
residual_risks.mitigation: Document requirement for reverse proxy with TLS

testing_gaps.description: No tests for CSRF token validation
No tests for cookie Secure flag
No tests for password strength validation
No tests for authenticated endpoint rate limiting
No tests for CSP, X-Frame-Options headers
